# `nise config get`

- **Usage**: `nise config get [-f --file <FILE>] [KEY]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/config/get.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/config/get.rs)

Display the value of a setting in a nise.toml file

## Arguments

### `[KEY]`

The path of the config to display

## Flags

### `-f --file <FILE>`

The path to the nise.toml file to edit

If not provided, the nearest nise.toml file will be used

Examples:

```
$ nise toml get tools.python
3.12
```
